name: inpaint_image
description: Edit specific regions of an image by providing a binary mask and a text prompt. White areas in the mask indicate regions to regenerate; black areas are preserved. The model generates new content in the masked region that matches the surrounding context and follows the text prompt. Useful for removing objects, adding elements, or fixing imperfections. The request must be sent as multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The source image to edit (multipart form upload). Supported formats: png, jpeg, webp.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: A black-and-white mask image (same dimensions as source). White pixels indicate areas to regenerate, black pixels are preserved.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Text description of what to generate in the masked area.

parameters.name: negative_prompt
parameters.description: Text describing what to avoid in the generated region.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed for reproducible results (0 to 4294967294).

body.mask: (binary mask image - white area where the old couch is)
body.prompt: A modern minimalist gray sofa with clean lines and wooden legs, matching the room's decor

response_example.body: (binary image with the masked region filled according to the prompt)
